mechanics.excerpt: By reducing the Character Point cost Of your Vehicle Trait by 2 points you take on lemon Your vehicle will have technical problems at bad times and will generally be hard t0 maintain; repair and even reload The spe cific effects this has on your vehicle are Up to the gamemaster, although in any case all Action Checks for repairing and main- taining the vehicle have an additional +1 modifier.
